description.para: These bits are associated with the XTG_MCNTL_OFFSET register.
These bits are associated with the XTG_SCNTL_OFFSET register.
These bits are shared with the XTG_ERR_STS_OFFSET and XTG_ERR_EN_OFFSET register.

sectiondef.header: Master Error Interrupt Enable Register bit definitions.

description.para: These bits are associated with the XTG_MSTERR_INTR_OFFSET register.
These bits are associated with the XTG_CFG_STS_OFFSET register.
These bits are associated with the XTG_STR_CFG_OFFSET register.
These bits are associated with the XTG_STR_CFG_OFFSET register.

sectiondef.header: Streaming Transfer Length Register bit definitions.

description.para: These bits are associated with the XTG_STR_TL_OFFSET register.
These bits are associated with the XTG_STATIC_CNTL_OFFSET register.
These bits are associated with the XTG_STATIC_LEN_OFFSET register.

sectiondef.header: Axi Traffic Generator Command Entry field mask/shifts
Axi Traffic Generator Parameter Entry field mask/shifts

briefdescription.para: XTrafGen_ReadReg returns the value read from the register specified by RegOffset.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the Axi TrafGen device.
is the offset of the register to be read.

simplesect.para: Returns the 32-bit value of the register.
C-style signature: u32 XTrafGen_ReadReg(u32 BaseAddress, u32 RegOffset)

briefdescription.para: XTrafGen_WriteReg, writes Data to the register specified by RegOffset.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the Axi TrafGen device.
is the offset of the register to be written.
is the 32-bit value to write to the register.

simplesect.para: None.
C-style signature: void XTrafGen_WriteReg(u32 BaseAddress, u32 RegOffset, u32 Data)

briefdescription.para: XTrafGen_ReadParamRam returns the value read from the Parameter RAM specified by Offset.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the Axi TrafGen device.
is the offset of the Parameter RAM to be read.

simplesect.para: Returns the 32-bit value of the memory location.
C-style signature: u32 XTrafGen_ReadParamRam(u32 BaseAddress, u32 Offset)

briefdescription.para: XTrafGen_WriteParamRam, writes Data to the Parameter RAM specified by Offset.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the Axi TrafGen device.
is the offset of the location in Parameter RAM to be written.
is the 32-bit value to write to the Parameter RAM.

simplesect.para: None.
C-style signature: void XTrafGen_WriteParamRam(u32 BaseAddress, u32 Offset, u32 Data)

briefdescription.para: XTrafGen_ReadCmdRam returns the value read from the Command RAM specified by Offset.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the Axi TrafGen device.
is the offset of the Command RAM to be read.

simplesect.para: Returns the 32-bit value of the memory location.
C-style signature: u32 XTrafGen_ReadCmdRam(u32 BaseAddress, u32 Offset)

briefdescription.para: XTrafGen_ReadCmdRam_Msb returns the value read from the Command RAM specified by Offset.

parameterdescription.para: is the MSB of base address of the Axi TrafGen device.
is the offset of the Command RAM to be read.

simplesect.para: Returns the 32-bit value of the memory location.
C-style signature: u32 XTrafGen_ReadCmdRam_Msb(u32 BaseAddress, u32 Offset)

briefdescription.para: XTrafGen_WriteCmdRam, writes Data to the Command RAM specified by Offset.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the Axi TrafGen device.
is the offset of the location in Command RAM to be written.
is the 32-bit value to write to the Command RAM.

simplesect.para: None.
C-style signature: void XTrafGen_WriteCmdRam(u32 BaseAddress, u32 Offset, u32 Data)

briefdescription.para: XTrafGen_WriteCmdRam_Msb, writes Data to the Command RAM specified by Offset.

parameterdescription.para: is the MSB of base address of the Axi TrafGen device.
is the offset of the location in Command RAM to be written.
is the 32-bit value to write to the Command RAM.

simplesect.para: None.
C-style signature: void XTrafGen_WriteCmdRam_Msb(u32 BaseAddress, u32 Offset, u32 Data)

briefdescription.para: XTrafGen_ReadMasterRam returns the value read from the Master RAM specified by Offset.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the Axi TrafGen device.
is the offset of the Master RAM to be read.

simplesect.para: Returns the 32-bit value of the memory location.
C-style signature: u32 XTrafGen_ReadMasterRam(u32 BaseAddress, u32 Offset)

briefdescription.para: XTrafGen_WriteMasterRam, writes Data to the Master RAM specified by Offset.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the Axi TrafGen device.
is the offset of the location in Master RAM to be written.
is the 32-bit value to write to the Master RAM.

simplesect.para: None.
C-style signature: void XTrafGen_WriteMasterRam(u32 BaseAddress, u32 Offset, u32 Data)
